title: 你身材真好
description_uz: «Qomating juda chiroyli, tez-tez sport bilan shug'ullanasanmi?» — Ikki do'st sport zali haqida suhbatlashadi: narxi, qanday mashq qilish, zerikmaslik va murabbiy yollash. Bu dialog odat haqida so'rash, maslahat berish va motivatsiyani mashq qiladi. Fitnes mavzusidagi amaliy so'zlarga boy. Tinglash va rol o'ynash uchun ajoyib.
description_ru: «У тебя отличная фигура, ты часто занимаешься спортом?» — Двое друзей говорят о спортзале: цена, как тренироваться, как не скучать и стоит ли нанимать тренера. Диалог тренирует расспросы о привычках, советы и мотивацию. Богат практичной фитнес-лексикой. Отлично подходит для аудирования и ролевой игры.
description_en: «You're in great shape — do you work out often?» — Two friends talk about the gym: the price, how to train, staying entertained, and hiring a coach. The dialogue practices asking about habits, giving advice, and motivation. Rich in practical fitness vocabulary. Great for listening and role-play.

sentences.text_original: 你身材真好，是不是常运动？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ shēncái zhēn hǎo, shì bu shì cháng yùndòng?
sentences.text_translation: Qomating juda chiroyli ekan, tez-tez sport bilan shug'ullanasanmi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: У тебя отличная фигура, ты часто занимаешься спортом?
sentences.text_translation_en: You're in great shape — do you work out often?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Duì, wǒ měi zhōu dōu qù jiànshēnfáng.
sentences.text_translation: Ha, men har hafta sport zaliga boraman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Да, я каждую неделю хожу в спортзал.
sentences.text_translation_en: Yeah, I go to the gym every week.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Wǒ bàn de shì yuèkǎ, liǎng bǎi kuài.
sentences.text_translation: Men oylik karta oldim, ikki yuz yuan.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я оформил месячный абонемент, двести юаней.
sentences.text_translation_en: I got a monthly pass — two hundred yuan.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ qù jiànshēnfáng dōu liàn shénme?
sentences.text_translation_en: What do you train at the gym?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 先跑步热身，然后再练力量。
sentences.pinyin: Xiān pǎobù rèshēn, ránhòu zài liàn lìliàng.
sentences.text_translation: Avval yugurib qizinaman, keyin kuch mashqlarini qilaman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Сначала бегаю для разминки, потом занимаюсь силовыми.
sentences.text_translation_en: First I jog to warm up, then I do strength training.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Yí gè rén qù huì bu huì wúliáo?
sentences.text_translation_en: Isn't it boring to go alone?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 可以听歌，时间过得很快。
sentences.pinyin: Kěyǐ tīng gē, shíjiān guò de hěn kuài.
sentences.text_translation: Qo'shiq eshitsa bo'ladi, vaqt tez o'tadi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Можно слушать музыку, время идёт быстро.
sentences.text_translation_en: You can listen to music — time goes by fast.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 我跑几分钟就累，怎么办？
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ pǎo jǐ fēnzhōng jiù lèi, zěnme bàn?
sentences.text_translation: Men bir necha daqiqa yugursam charchayman, nima qilay?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я устаю уже через несколько минут бега, что делать?
sentences.text_translation_en: I get tired after just a few minutes of running — what should I do?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 刚开始都这样，慢慢增加时间就好。
sentences.pinyin: Gāng kāishǐ dōu zhèyàng, mànman zēngjiā shíjiān jiù hǎo.
sentences.text_translation: Boshida hamma shunday, asta-sekin vaqtni oshirsang bo'ldi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: В начале у всех так, постепенно увеличивай время, и всё наладится.
sentences.text_translation_en: Everyone's like that at first — just increase the time gradually.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 请了两次，学会动作就自己练。
sentences.pinyin: Qǐng le liǎng cì, xuéhuì dòngzuò jiù zìjǐ liàn.
sentences.text_translation: Ikki marta yolladim, harakatlarni o'rgangach o'zim mashq qilaman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Нанимал два раза, освоил движения и тренируюсь сам.
sentences.text_translation_en: Twice — once I learned the movements, I train on my own.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 听你这么一说，我也想试试。
sentences.pinyin: Tīng nǐ zhème yì shuō, wǒ yě xiǎng shìshi.
sentences.text_translation: Sening gaplaringni eshitib, men ham sinab ko'rgim keldi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Послушав тебя, я тоже захотел попробовать.
sentences.text_translation_en: Hearing you say that, I want to give it a try too.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Hǎo a, xià cì dài nǐ yìqǐ qù.
sentences.text_translation: Yaxshi, keyingi safar seni birga olib boraman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Отлично, в следующий раз возьму тебя с собой.
sentences.text_translation_en: Sure — next time I'll take you along.
sentences.speaker: B
